step_rationale: Prognostic marker in ACS; renal/systemic axis off-pathway.
mechanism: FGF23 acts as a systemic prognostic biomarker for acute coronary syndrome severity and post-MI mortality, reflecting hemodynamic and metabolic stress.

references.title: Fibroblast Growth Factor 23 as a Prognostic Biomarker in Post-Myocardial Infarction Outcomes: Influence of Renal Function and Its Modulation by Klotho.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
